text.title: Risk Assessment Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are we at a pre-launch / pre-major-change gate?

conclusion.verdict: broaden the brainstorm; <7 candidates likely missed a dimension
score P10/P50/P90, assign owners + triggers + decisions

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
